channel.title: Beginner Robotics Projects (Raspberry Pi & DIY Builds) on Robot Amateur

item.title: Video 1 - I built a simple 3D-Printed Robot Gripper w/ Raspberry Pi (Beginner Friendly!)
item.description: Robotic gripper build materials — resources and video links; Wiring diagram and code.
